name: zwibba-website
description: Zwibba - Petites Annonces | Landing page for DRC classifieds

scripts.smoke:app: node scripts/build.mjs && test -f dist/App/index.html && test -f dist/assets/app/app.css && test -f dist/assets/app/app.js
scripts.smoke:website: node scripts/build.mjs && test -f dist/index.html && test -f dist/App/index.html && test -f dist/assets/app/app.js
scripts.smoke:workspaces: test -f apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml && test -f apps/api/package.json && test -f apps/admin/package.json
scripts.test:e2e:beta: npm run test:e2e:seller:beta && npm run test:e2e:messages:beta && npm run test:e2e:matrix:beta
